history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible up ahead and to the right. The cell directly in front of me is lava, so moving forward would be unsafe. The cell to my right is open floor, so the best next step is to turn right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible ahead and to the left, but the cell directly in front of me is lava, so I cannot move forward. Turning left would face a safe floor cell and move me toward the corridor leading to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
